allSeaEvents.name: Ship Raid
allSeaEvents.description: Regular pirate ship that attacks your boat until defeated or you sail out of distance
allSeaEvents.how_to_defeat: Attack the pirate ship until destroyed

allSeaEvents.name: Sea Beast
allSeaEvents.description: Large sea monster that emerges from the water
allSeaEvents.how_to_defeat: Attack the Sea Beast until defeated

allSeaEvents.name: Shark
allSeaEvents.description: Group of sharks that attack your boat

allSeaEvents.name: Piranha
allSeaEvents.description: Small piranhas that swarm your boat

allSeaEvents.name: Rough Sea
allSeaEvents.description: Random event with lightning that damages players and boat health
allSeaEvents.how_to_escape: Sail forward for 10-15 seconds to exit

allSeaEvents.name: Treasure Island
allSeaEvents.description: Small island with multiple chests containing money and fragments
allSeaEvents.how_to_get: Land on island and open chests

allSeaEvents.name: Haunted Ship Raid
allSeaEvents.description: Ghost brigade-looking boat that attacks until defeated
allSeaEvents.how_to_defeat: Attack the Ghost Ship until destroyed

allSeaEvents.name: Rumbling Waters
allSeaEvents.description: Turbulent water that damages boat and players

allSeaEvents.name: Terrorshark
allSeaEvents.description: Larger, more dangerous version of regular sharks

allSeaEvents.name: Kitsune Island
allSeaEvents.description: Rare island event with special rewards

allSeaEvents.name: Mirage Island
allSeaEvents.description: Rare island with many chests, hard to find but rewards big
allSeaEvents.how_to_get: Find and land on Mirage Island, open all chests

allSeaEvents.name: Leviathan
allSeaEvents.description: Boss with two HP bars and shield that must be destroyed by attacking tails
allSeaEvents.how_to_defeat: Destroy shield by attacking tails, then attack HP bars

allSeaEvents.name: Frozen Dimension
allSeaEvents.description: Portal that teleports to Leviathan raid
allSeaEvents.how_to_access: Speak with blue orb after bribing Spy NPC at Tiki Outpost
